text.title: tailwind-design-tokens Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for tailwind-design-tokens as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Color token defined as hex in Tailwind config: primary: 'var(--color-primary)'
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: bg-primary/50 silently renders as fully opaque because the opacity modifier cannot decompose a hex CSS variable into RGB channels.
